findings.finding: The existing stop/go audit records no direct submit-ready remaining routes, no browser submissions available and no safe portal actions.

The register lists CKAF, DRIVE35, ZEVI2 and quantum partner targets as evidence-acquisition candidates only. It states that a target reply must supply route-specific lead, asset, permission, budget or work-package evidence before portal action.
The remaining-route PDF pack covers CKAF, DRIVE35, ZEVI2, quantum hardware and DRIVE35 Scale Up, but it is an outreach/support pack rather than a set of commitments.
No Drive result was found for CKAF or GOTT plus Aureon.
No Drive result was found for DRIVE35 or Wrightbus plus Aureon.
No Drive result was found for ZEVI2 or clean maritime plus Aureon.
The quantum hardware search returned old war-room and master-index material. No quantum hardware lead, facility access, consortium commitment or budget evidence was found.

findings.source: Aureon Grant War Room row searches
findings.finding: The spreadsheet contains older quantum watch items and academic/knowledge-provider planning. It does not contain current CKAF, DRIVE35, ZEVI2, quantum hardware lead or budget commitments.

Local search found audits, conversion packs, clean text, outreach drafts and partner-request packs. No public-sector research organisation lead, automotive partner, ZEV facility, maritime asset, quantum hardware access, co-investment, budget owner or signed commitment was found.

APP-IFS-CKAF-AUTUMN-2478-20260709: senior support or authorised lead evidence
APP-IFS-DRIVE35-SCALE-UP-2445-20260709: eligible GBP5m plus project cost basis

decision.why_not_now: The current local, Drive and Aureon evidence set contains formal route text and outreach packs, but no route-specific lead, partner, asset, facility, access, budget, co-investment or authorised commitment evidence for the remaining CKAF, DRIVE35, ZEVI2 or quantum routes.
decision.next_operator_action: Use the existing remaining-route outreach payloads to obtain route-specific lead, partner, asset, facility, budget, co-investment or access evidence. Re-run this delta immediately after any reply or partner document lands in Gmail, Drive or local folders.

controls: Local, Drive and official IFS evidence references were classified for grant-side use only.
Route-specific application statuses were preserved; this delta adds current evidence-readback state.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No IFS remaining-route draft was opened.
No external email, contact form, partner invite or upload action was performed.
No password, runtime secret, bank detail, tax reference or private finance payload was written to this artifact.
No internal draft language was introduced into funder-facing text.
No public target was treated as a partner commitment.
